## 🔌 Connecting Frontend Forms to the Inbound Lead Webhook
> **Lead Ingestion Notice:** This webhook URL acts as the entry gateway for all new leads. You can connect virtually any modern form builder or lead source to this endpoint to feed data into the automation pipeline seamlessly.

### 📋 Integration Methods by Platform:
* **Native Webhook Integrations (Typeform, Jotform, Elementor Forms):** * Go to your form's settings/integrations panel, select **Webhooks**, and paste the production URL from this node. Configure the form to send data via a **POST** request.
* **WordPress / Contact Form 7 / Gravity Forms:** * Use a lightweight webhook add-on plugin to automatically dispatch the form fields as a JSON payload to this webhook URL upon user submission.
* **Custom Code (React, Vue, HTML/JS):** * Ensure your frontend developer structures a standard JavaScript `fetch()` or `axios.post()` function targeting this URL, passing the lead data inside the request body.

### ⚠️ Critical Data Mapping Rule:
* To pass the **Validate Required Fields** node immediately following this trigger, ensure your form fields map exactly to the expected JSON keys (e.g., matching lowercase keys like `email`, `name`, or `company` precisely).

## 🚀 AI Lead Nurture System — Read This First
Stop losing leads to slow follow-up. This is workflow 1 of 4
in a complete lead automation system: capture → nurture
(email + SMS + AI) → classify replies → daily report.
This template is fully functional once you connect your own
credentials. No fake demo — this is the real production logic.

⚡ Quick setup (DIY, ~2-3 hrs):
1. Create a Google Sheet with the required columns 
2. Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID_HERE with your Sheet ID
3. Connect credentials: Google Sheets, Gmail, OpenRouter
4. Get workflows 1-4 here: [Buy on Gumroad](https://jawadsyed5.gumroad.com/l/xlrhb)

⏱ Or skip the setup entirely (60 min, done-for-you):
Pre-built Google Sheet template + step-by-step video walkthrough
+ all 4 workflows pre-wired + error handling & alert workflow
(get notified if something breaks) + Join my private buyer Discord for instant support

→ Get the full system on Gumroad: [Buy on Gumroad](https://jawadsyed5.gumroad.com/l/xlrhb)

Built for busy founders who'd rather close deals than debug nodes.

## ⚠️ CRITICAL: SMS Consent Mapping Required

To utilize SMS capabilities, your frontend intake form **must** include an explicit (unchecked by default) **SMS Consent Checkbox**.

### 🔧 Mapping Requirement:
* Map your form's consent checkbox exactly to **`sms_consent`** in the incoming webhook payload.
* **Expected Values:** `true` / `false` (or `1` / `0`).

> 💡 **Note:** If this field is missing or false, the system will gracefully degrade and **only send email notifications**. 
> 
> *Compliance Disclaimer: You are responsible for designing the actual UI and legal consent language on your frontend form to match your local compliance laws (TCPA/GDPR).*

## 🚀 AI Lead Nurture System — Workflow 1 of 4: Lead Intake
**What this system does end-to-end:**
A fully automated lead nurturing pipeline for service-based businesses.
When a lead submits a form, they are instantly captured, deduplicated,
and staged for a 3-touch AI-written email + SMS follow-up sequence.
Replies are classified by an LLM, hot leads are escalated to you in
real time, and a daily performance report lands in your inbox every morning.
If anything breaks at any step, you get an immediate error alert by email. (Not included in free version)

→ Get the full system with pre-made Google Sheet on Gumroad: [Buy on Gumroad](https://jawadsyed5.gumroad.com/l/xlrhb)

**What this specific workflow does:**
Receives new leads via a POST webhook (from any form builder, website,
or CRM), validates required fields (email + phone), sanitizes the data,
checks for duplicates in Google Sheets, and appends clean new leads
ready for the nurture scheduler to pick up.

**Who it's for:**
Freelancers, agency owners, and solo founders who generate inbound leads
from websites or landing pages and want every lead followed up
automatically — without hiring a VA or touching a CRM.

**System overview (5 workflows):**
1. ➡️ Lead Intake (Webhook) ← YOU ARE HERE
2. Nurture Scheduler (Email + SMS + LLM)
3. Reply Listener (LLM Intent Classifier)
4. Daily Report
5. Error Handling Monitors all 4 workflows (Not included in free version)

**Credentials needed:**
- Google Sheets (OAuth2)
- Gmail (OAuth2)

## Receive and validate lead

Handles the initial webhook intake, checks whether required fields are present, returns a 400 error for incomplete submissions, and sanitizes valid lead data before continuing.

## Lookup existing lead

Applies the configured sheet details and searches Google Sheets for an existing row matching the submitted email address.

## Evaluate duplicate status

Interprets the sheet lookup result, branches based on whether the lead is a duplicate, and immediately responds when the email is already registered.

## Append accepted lead

Configures the target sheet for new leads, appends non-duplicate lead data to Google Sheets, and returns a successful lead-accepted webhook response.
